output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?inductionDate WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P172 wd:Q87348 ; rdfs:label 'Sandown 500' @en ; wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2001)
  ?event p:P1535 ?positionStatement .
  ?positionStatement ps:P1535 '1' .
  ?positionStatement pq:P1313 ?driver .
  ?driver wdt:P3171 ?hallOfFame .
  ?hallOfFame wdt:P585 ?inductionDate .
}
